subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! A letter was previously written to thee, and now the Most Exalted Leaf doth intercede [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی نامه ای از پیش بشما نگاشته شد حال ورقه علیا شفاعت مینمایند و
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @spiritual transformation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
